title: Spa Etiquette and Information
content: Our Thalassotherapy Spa is open daily from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM. We recommend booking treatments at least 24 hours in advance. Guests are requested to arrive 15 minutes before their scheduled appointment. Bathrobes and slippers are provided in your room.

title: Dining Options at Atlas Breeze
content: The hotel features three main restaurants: 'L'Océan' for international buffet breakfast and dinner, 'Le Kasbah' for authentic Moroccan cuisine, and 'The Grill' for poolside snacks and fresh seafood. Reservations are recommended for dinner at Le Kasbah.

title: Local Area and Transportation
content: The hotel is located directly on the Agadir promenade. The city center is a 15-minute walk away. Taxis are readily available outside the main entrance. We also offer bicycle rentals for guests who wish to explore the coastline.
